title: Refractor
description: A simple utility plugin intended to provide a small set of useful server tools without being bloated with unnecessary options or features.
body:
# Refractor
| Type              | Badges                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
|-------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **General:**      | ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-4.0-blue) ![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supports%3A%20-Spigot%201.20-orange)                                                                        |                                             |
| **CI:**   | [![Java CI with Maven](https://github.com/TheBozzz34/Refractor/actions/workflows/maven.yml/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://github.com/TheBozzz34/Refractor/actions/workflows/maven.yml) |
                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              


![logo](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Refractor.svg)

A 1.20 plugin currently being developed by [Necrozma](https://discordapp.com/users/457659194535837727)

---

### Refractor is a small plugin intended to provide only a small set of useful tools and commands. It strives to remain useful while leaving out complicated or frivolous features.
---

## Some features include:

- Gamemode shortcuts eg: `/gmc`, `/gma`
- Day/Night shortcuts eg: `/day`, `/night`
- Heal and Feed Commands
- Join/Leave messages
- Title and Weather commands
- Moderation commands such as /ban and /mute

---
